category: Guided Weapons & Missiles — Other Axis Powers

weapons.name: Antonescu Anti-Tank Grenade (OG 43)
weapons.notes: Romanian-developed anti-tank grenade used on the Eastern Front. Improvised alternatives were common as Romanian forces faced Soviet armour with limited dedicated anti-tank weapons.

weapons.name: Type 4 Anti-Tank Grenade (Japan)
weapons.notes: Japanese shaped-charge anti-tank grenade designed for close-range use against Allied armour in the Pacific. Often used in suicide attacks as Japanese forces lacked effective portable anti-tank weapons.

weapons.name: Spoleto 45/5
weapons.notes: Italian recoilless anti-tank weapon developed late in the war. Saw limited operational use before Italy's armistice in 1943; subsequently some were used by RSI (Italian Social Republic) forces.
